The Crimson Wanderer walks a road few dare to find. At its end stands the enlightened one, undefeated, untouchable, the living myth of the blade.
Between you and him, seven legendary warriors wait in silence. Each one a wall. Each one a lesson.
This is not a battle of strength. It is a battle of stillness. One breath. One moment. One truth.
Honor the fallen. Carry their wisdom. Let each duel shape the swordsman you are becoming.
The path is long. The silence is deep. The enlightened one is waiting."

Long forsaken gods have been left to rot beyond eternity, yet something still calls. Prepare for a dark odyssey where every disturbing encounter and mind-expanding puzzle will draw you deeper into the macabre.

Five years have passed since the underground explorer was imprisoned. The darkness that lurks in the underworld bares its fangs once again.

The targets were the students of Yomi High School.

The only way to survive in the hell they are transported to along with their classroom is
to revive the corpses of their friends and use them as fighting forces.

It's not a choice, it's something you have to do to survive.

title: Solis
summary:
Solis is a hand-drawn adventure about technology and deception in a city at night.
During a company trip you explore the city of Solis from dusk till dawn, talking with its inhabitants and meeting colleagues. This night you learn the painful truth about the company you work for. Will you remain loyal?
In the game you explore an atmospheric and compact open world. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text adjusts to reflect your choices.

In Solis you explore the city, investigate your surroundings and talk with the inhabitants and colleagues you meet. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text dynamically adjusts to reflect your choices. Interactions are streamlined to utilize a single button, aided by context-sensitive interaction icons. The GUI is a sparse as possible. Solis offers multiple endings and is crafted to be concise and compact. The complete game is estimated to run for approximately 2,5 hours.

summary: Explore a warped Manhattan on the brink of paranatural annihilation in this thrilling action-adventure RPG. Unleash the extraordinary powers of Dylan Faden as he fights for his humanity and survival against a reality-bending cosmic threat.

title: Huni Kuin: Beya Xinã Bena
summary: A 2D platform game about the ancient stories of the Huni Kuin indigenous people, who live in the Brazilian Amazon. The entire game was produced in collaboration with the Huni Kuin communities of the Jordão river, in Acre.

title: Vampire Rancher
summary: Rancher by day, Vampire by night. Manage your time and resources to restore your sleepy little town to its former glory, all while satisfying your vampire needs for blood. Oversee shops and saloons, farm crops and humans, and explore ancient vampiric ruins in the Weird Wild West!

title: Shark Rain
summary: The very first Shark-Based Shooter game! Become a cute shark-girl and speed through water then emerge in human form and blast your enemies to oblivion! Nowhere will they be safe, not even on land!

title: Remorses
summary: Learn terrifying witchcraft and investigate. Sanity? Open windows, or lose it.

title: Changer Seven
summary: Fast-Paced Lane-Based Action Brawler. The legendary Changers 7 heroes must fight a new threat that changes the citizens of Sunny Point into terrifying beings! But as they investigate and defeat "villain of the week" like enemies, they suspect that someone from their own group may be behind it all.

title: The Last Grape
summary: The Last Grape is a game about fruits, vegetables and vengeance. Slice through your enemies with speed and precision in this action, fast paced platform where you control a tiny grape in seek for revenge.

title: Robo Frenzy
summary: Build and battle in Robo Frenzy! Create dozens of weapons and construct inventions to crush gigantic gadgets in a sandbox action game that blends crafting with combat.

similarGames.name: Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order

title: Not Only Nine
summary: A narrative turn-based RPG where the only fights are the bosses. Play as a cat and journey through the afterlife to save your human. Meet loveable characters and explore what it means to exist.

title: Atmosfar
summary: Atmosfar is a sky-high odyssey set on an alien planet of floating islands explored by flying crafts and a mobile airbase as you uncover the fate of your collapsed colony.

title: The Battle for Vega
summary: Inspired by the classic Space Invaders, The Battle for Vega takes the old-school gameplay you know and love and adds new features that make it a fresh and exciting experience.

title: Mariachi Legends
summary: Mariachi Legends is an action-packed mystery Metroidvania game. In Mariachi Legends, Join fantastical festivities at the Day of the Dead carnival alongside Detective Pablo Cruz, currently masquerading as a mariachi player to investigate an evil curse looming over the serene town of Santa Mascota.

title: Dimhaven: The Lost Source
summary: After several years, the team behind Quern - Undying Thoughts is back with new mysteries to unfold. Explore Dimhaven, solve mind-bending puzzles and uncover the truth behind the Ravenwood legacy in this first-person adventure.

title: The Hungry Town
summary:
The Hungry Town is an interactive visual novel in a dark fantasy setting with vampires.
You are a young vampire who has been drawn into a violent confrontation between two generations of vampires. You will have to choose a side or decide to stay true to yourself.

title: Neo Junk City
summary: Dive into Neo Junk City, a cyberpunk adventure where you’re an android detective unraveling your own murky past. Navigate neon streets, engage with unique characters, and race through the rain-soaked city. Uncover secrets in this twist on point-and-click gameplay.

title: Football, Tactics & Glory: World
summary: XCOM meets Football Manager. Embark on the career of an unknown coach: tactically outsmart opponents in turn-based matches, earn money and experience, search for talented players, manage a club, build your reputation to get invited to lead the national team, and win the World Championship!

title: Little Cheese Works
summary: This is a cooperative action game where you have to carry cheese to the goal without being found by cats. You can have a conversation with voice chat, but the slightest noise will wake up the cat. Let's carry the cheese quietly by breathing quietly so that the cat won't find it!

title: Peacemaker: Bloody Emperor
summary: A dark fantasy JRPG. The imperial princess Chrysoberyl must fight the Bloody Emperor who has usurped the throne. However, her army is small and her allies are conniving. It is a bloody war where she will have to choose between peace and lives...

title: Elemdian
summary: RPG that combines exploration with magic combat. Unfurl your claws as a powerful werewolf warrior wielding the power of the Elegems! A journey to find the Elegems, unleash devastating spells, and unravel the mysteries of Morrok.

title: Rubinite
summary: "Rubinite" is a dark fantasy boss rush action game that utilizes the unique mechanic "Focus" to pinpoint enemies' weaknesses and execute thrust attacks. Follow Ruby, a princess who has escaped from the Scarlet Kingdom, embarking on a journey of revenge to reclaim her kingdom.

title: Amp
summary: Dive into the synesthetic world of Amp, the neon rail shooter set in a polygonal rhythmic universe.

title: Fantastic Haven
summary: Restore the equilibrium of magic by saving endangered fantasy creatures. Build your shelter to welcome and protect them, explore unique regions, rally neighboring populations to your cause and rehabilitate creatures in their natural environment.

title: Soggy Beans
summary: Fish will come, fish will go. Take photos, collect beans, decorate your seascape, then relax or do other things while your friends swim by in this calming side-idler.

title: Mainland
summary: Enter a cooperative medieval realm, forge alliances, lead armies, and engage in epic battles. Shape history with dynamic politics, or test your mettle against others in fierce player-vs-player combat.

title: Desktop Explorer
summary:
Desktop Explorer is an exploration-puzzle game set in a retro-style operating system. Solve puzzles by interacting with built-in software features, immersing yourself into a realistic late 90’s computer experience.

The game follows a fairly innocent narrative as you progress through it’s puzzles. However it becomes clear to you that there is more than meets the eye with this machine, as you slowly see its familiar façade fade away in favor of a darker aesthetic..

title: Pight
summary: Pight is a minimalist puzzle game inspired by the Minecraft redstone system, in which we try to turn on the light block by using piston blocks and different block types.

title: The Witch's Bakery
summary:
The Witch’s Bakery is a 2D Adventure Puzzle game where you play as a joyful witch who opens a bakery in modern Paris.

She has a special power: she can heal emotions with her bread.

title: Momento
summary: Journey through a life where the objects you choose to keep influence the life you lead. A cozy room decorator with whimsical settings; relaxing gameplay; and charming branching narratives, Momento will be a warm ode to the challenge of following your dreams down the winding road of life.

title: Tidebound
summary: Tidebound is a fishing and inventory management game with a relaxing, casual atmosphere. Catch, sell, upgrade your boat, and sail further to catch more expensive and exotic sea animals. Casual yet engaging, the game offers a sense of progress with tons of equipment and hundreds of species to catch.

title: Wildsite
summary: Crash-landed on an unknown planet filled with plasma and toxic weather. Your only hope? Bob, a sarcastic-genius AI who will question your every survival decision. Explore, build your mobile base and try to avoid death alongside up to 3 friends in Co-op.

title: Advaria: Chronicles of Immortality
summary: Welcome, my Lord, to the cursed kingdom. A land plagued by black magic and creatures that crawl out of the darkness. Once this was a great kingdom. It could be great again. That's all up to you. Enter the world of Advaria - a hero defense game set in a world of fantasy and adventure.

title: Teeto
summary: Teeto is a 3D adventure platformer where you play as a tiny blob and bunny duo on an extraordinary journey. Absorb objects from the world, harnessing their powers to fight the shadow corruption and help out a cast of crazy characters in an action packed adventure!

title: Emery Hearts
summary: Immerse yourself in this thrilling action JRPG and uncover the secrets of Emery crystals as you face challenging enemies that will demand all your skill and ingenuity to defeat them.

title: Infinity Knights: Xross
summary: A King and his Infinity Knights wield The Armaments - weapons capable of reviving slain enemies. Xross, the newest Infinity Knight, will embark on a life-changing adventure as he experiences both the thrill and dark reality of what it means to be eternal.

title: Delverium
summary: Explore, Build, Farm, Craft and Fight in this vast procedurally generated survival adventure for up to 4 players. What you do is up to you, but the deeper you delve, the more you uncover the hidden truth. Could you be the hero to restore stability to the land and put an end to the invading "Faults"?

title: Head Chef
summary: Head Chef is a restaurant management game. Supply the kitchen, select your staff, create a delicious menu and… cook! Make your guests happy and find your way to the stars. Keep control of your team and finances, because the higher you climb, the harder you fall.

title: Emblems: Sunless Vow
summary: Can they stop arguing long enough to escape the void?! A Roguelike Visual Novel with QUICK turn-based combat and flexible difficulty. Calculate, power-up, and stack favors to The Heart's content... Or take on a narrative campaign filled with Mystery + Drama + Shenanigans.

title: LlamaRPG: Farm to Fable
summary: A turn-based combat RPG following a llama traveling around the world trying to be a hero. Full of great itemization, crafting, story, hat collecting, and more.

title: Hexforger
summary: Craft your spells in ONLINE CO-OP with your friends in this SURVIVORS-LIKE! Slaughter monsters, gain gold, upgrade your spells to infinite heights. Crush challenges and unlock new spells, upgrades, pickups, realms. Up to 4 players in this unique twist on the survivors-like formula!

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Terrible Lizards
summary: Terrible Lizards is a horror parkour game set against the backdrop of an old Route 66 attraction… with something dark and sinister lurking below. To escape, you’ll need to move fast, navigate challenging terrain, and uncover what Dalton’s Dinos is really hiding. You’d better start running.

title: One Fenix Down
summary: A retro-inspired, classic turn-based RPG for those with nostalgia for the '90s golden era. Explore a vast world with 14 playable characters, fight hundreds of unique enemies, and delve into an epic story of war, betrayal, and redemption.

title: Zerra's Adventure
summary: Zerra's Adventure is a classic turn-based RPG with no random encounters. Explore diverse areas, collect items and treasures to improve your team and defeat the strangest enemies. Level up, learn new attacks, and meet quirky characters on your adventure!

title: What Awaits, Aleksey?
summary: Utilize your analytical skills to connect the dots and unveil hidden conspiracies! Join the ranks of the People's Intelligence Bureau as a junior cryptologist, decipher cryptic messages and unravel plots brewed up by enemies of the state. Or . . . decide to save them...?

title: Prelude Dark Pain
summary: Prelude Dark Pain is a Tactical RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Assume the role of a local blacksmith named Soren, lead an uprising against the Order of the Ash Crusade and save a world ravaged by war.

title: Coding Day
summary: In "Coding Day", you are a videogame developer whose project is about to be released, but a sinister entity threatens its publication, and you must survive it throughout the night in a dark office building full of mysteries and dangers.

title: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past
summary: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past is a 3d metroidvania that aims to reproduce the experience of a 2d metroidvania in 3d. It features a labyrinthine world in which you'll need to collect upgrades to unlock new passages and make your way out of the labyrinth.

title: Below, Rusted Gods
summary: A short horror game where you control an operator helping an expedition through a hole descending into the unknown.

title: Aokaki
summary: Aokaki is a fast-paced 2D platformer where you play as an isopod ronin. Explore fun and challenging levels while battling against the forces of the evil Shogun in this bug inhabited pixelart world.

title: Shoe it All!
summary: Swing, fling, and cause chaos with your shoes in this physics-based mayhem. Discover secrets, unlock bonus levels, customize your look, and fill your journal with shiny stickers. Master the perfect throw and SHOE IT ALL!

title: Nocturnal II
summary: Nocturnal 2 is an action-adventure game that lets you explore and rekindle the dark depths and towering heights of the city of Ytash.

title: Pinball Hero
summary: In this game the pinball IS the hero! Ascend from the Goblin Caves, to the Perilous Plains and defeat the evil wizard in the Hallowed Castle to reclaim your adventurer spirit! Battle slimes, skeletons, goblins, ghouls, and other fantasy creatures in the retro-inspired reimagining of Pinball.

title: Barbarization
summary: Barbarization is a roguelite dungeon crawler with elements of bullet hell, deck building and strategy. Civilization fell to the dark legions now swarming this land. From the ruins of what is left, unlikely heroes emerge to reclaim it from the scourge.

title: Neo Ha_Bits
summary: Neo Ha_Bits plunges players into a chilling journey of psychological horror and mystery within a cyberpunk setting.

title: Cardinal Descent
summary: Cardinal Descent is a card building roguelike where you craft elemental synergies and find game breaking sticker combos.

title: Escape of The Hammer Princess
summary: A retro-styled rampage in both 3D and 2D! After years of waiting to be rescued, the Princess has decided to rescue herself. Escape as the princess in exciting retro-styled 3D, and relive the deaths of her would-be rescuers in classic 8-bit 2D! Bash some Skulls, Break Stuff, and Rise as a Legend!

title: Mightreya
summary: Join schoolgirl superhero Reya and her manager Nio as they embark on their journey as Hero Content Creators, fighting monstrous beings that emerge daily from a dimension beyond. Anime-inspired, heart-pounding hero action is waiting for you!
alternativeNames: 超能蕾雅的异次元之旅
超能蕾雅的異次元之旅

title: Coring
summary: Coring is a fast-paced, turn-based strategy game with rogue-like elements. Play as Pruner 'III', a reborn entity tasked with severing abnormal branches to protect the World Tree. Piece together memories to uncover the truth of your endless rebirth.

title: Ogora
summary: Ogora is a fantasy roguelike deck-builder where you will craft powerful decks, cast unwieldy spells, and blow up your own path through a procedurally generated dungeon. Adorn yourself with hidden trinkets and try to survive!

title: MineGeon: Renegades
summary: Descend into Planet Paimo in MineGeon: Renegades, a chaotic multiplayer roguelite where you choose your renegade, delve into the minegeons, and battle unique enemies across diverse biomes. Fight, gather, improve, and die to uncover the secrets of Paimo and New Olympia.

title: Scourge of the Reptiles
summary: Scourge of the Reptiles is a party-based tactical RPG set in a prehistoric fantasy world. When a meteor strikes the Earth, humans, elves and dinosaurs alike are gifted with magical abilities—abilities that result in war, devastation and forces that stretch far beyond the hero’s quiet home village.

title: Just A Shadow Game
summary: Hear me, pitiful mortals, for I shall reveal to you the path to true power - a demonic fusion of deckbuilding, ritual duels, and roguelite! I speak of a realm shrouded in darkness, where only the most wicked may thrive. Behold my masterpiece, "Just A Shadow Game".

title: Nightmare Circus
summary: Nightmare Circus is an action-adventure game where the player takes on the role of a Puppeteer trapped in the Nightmare Realm. Set out on a journey to find his friends and escape the nightmare!

title: Piñata Puppy World
summary: Piñata Puppy World is a 2000’s nostalgia driven explorative campaign game with a dramatic and surreal storyline disguised within the genre of “Mascot Horror”.

title: Eldritch Escape
summary:
In this roguelike bullet-heaven, Earth has been consumed by an ancient eldritch god. Form a customizable squad of survivors and explore decaying, metroidvania-inspired worlds trapped within the god’s belly. Battle endless waves of nightmarish creatures, extract resources, rescue survivors, uncover forbidden knowledge, and search for a way out.

Portals powered by ancient eldritch forces link worlds and realities, forming a tangled web. With a limited oxygen supply, your squad has just 20 minutes to navigate the portal network, jumping from world to world in search of the one escape route. Can you escape the void in time?

title: Operation Zero
summary: Grab your biggest gun and jump into this story-driven top-down run-and-gun sci-fi arcade shooter starring the ultimate bio-engineered hero-manchild TASKILLER!

title: Hotel Tales
summary: Hotel Tales is a mystery hotel manager set in the crossroads between worlds. Dive into the amazing, frightening and funny stories of guests and colleagues, discover the hotel's secrets and try to survive at least to the end of your probationary period!

title: Deforb
summary: Deforb is a roguelite top-down shooter game where a mad orb defends its tower using up to four melee guns, a long-range gun, and strategically placed turrets. Upgrade your skills and craft powerful builds to survive relentless waves of enemies.

title: Rock Island
summary: Explore the mystery of the mysterious cube at the center of Boulder Island, dig out endless treasures, wake up the sleeping little boulder people, and lead them to create prosperity!

title: Death In Your Dice
summary: Can you outwit fate when your turn comes? From now on, all you care about is the game of dice and its consequences. Observe, investigate, act, defend yourself. Time is ticking away, but death will not wait.

title: Exoshock
summary: Exoshock is a cooperative sci-fi PvE shooter that redefines VR combat with intense firefights, squad tactics, and dynamic battlefields.

title: Castlebound
summary: Lead a band of heroes in a walking castle to battle endless hordes of enemies in this unique action-packed roguelike!

title: Hallow Maze
summary: Hallow Maze is an epic action adventure through an intricate world submerged in war. Explore twisting caves, enormous palaces, battle unhuman horrors and help those in need, in a gothic hand painted 2.5D artstyle.

title: Kamilia
summary:
Kamilia is an emotional, story-driven detective mystery where your choices shape the outcome.

Step into the shoes of a gifted painter, pulled into an unsolved mystery. An investigation that soon turns into something far deeper — an intimate, heartfelt search for truth.

Explore a beautifully crafted narrative blending mystery, emotion, and visual storytelling into a unique, choice-driven experience.

title: Abyss Ring
summary: Survive, cook, and conquer the depths! In this survival roguelike, cook monsters to stave off hunger through 100 floors of dungeons. With over 200 equipment and randomly generated dungeon, every playthrough offers fresh challenges and endless possibilities.

title: Bookbinding
summary: Try on the role of a bookbinder in a magic world with strict social hierarchy. Design book covers, uncover your customers' secrets, and shape their destinies, but remember: everything comes at a price!

title: Aurora Polaris
summary: Aurora Polaris is a vertical shoot 'em up set in a post-pandemic future where a mysterious old engineer brings together four unlikely pilots to stop a technocratic regime known as NOX. Blending arcade action, anime-inspired visuals, and heartfelt narrative, players engage in intense boss fights, upgrade their ships, and explore handcrafted stages across a frozen Earth. Featuring local co-op, emotional cutscenes, and a unique sci-fi take on holiday mythology.

title: Clawed
summary: Embark on a covert mission to the dinosaur theme park Prehistoria, where you must explore the park's grounds to scavenge resources, solve puzzles, and fight your way through diverse biomes, underground tunnels and deadly enclosures. But beware, you are not the apex predator here.

title: Foodomina
summary: Play as 2 personified Food girls, Takoyaki & Tempura, and fight Mold People, in space! Explore a whimsy, galactic food-themed society rich in flavour, engage in absurd pun-fueled combat, & save the galaxy from Mold infection! But Mold People used to be Food People... Maybe there's another way?

title: Sucks To Be In The Sticks
summary: An interview with a vampire from a decaying post-Soviet town. A cursed life simulator: scrub floors, brew moonshine, follow strange routines - and drink blood as your sanity unravels. The world is broken. Can you find out why?

title: The Devil's Due
summary: You lost your soul in a poker game against the Devil. Now, trapped in the infernal depths, your only hope is to fight your way back to freedom. You’ll face a diverse gallery of monstrous foes in nearly impossible poker battles - but luckily, you’re a cheater.

title: Ice Cream Simulator
summary: Run your dream ice cream shop and serve delicious treats from around the world! Craft Thai Rolls, Matka Kulfi, Mochi, cones, and more. Craft traditional recipes or use modern machines. Customize your shop, create a unique menu, hire staff, and keep customers happy as you build your ice cream empire!

title: Terradune
summary: Terradune is a hand-drawn 2D action RPG where you battle monsters, discover hidden treasures, and shape your hero’s fate. Explore scorching deserts, moonlit forests, and thrilling dungeons to uncover secrets in this fast-paced, immersive adventure.

title: Lucipurr
summary: Lucipurr is a multiplayer horror game. Players(1-5) try to disrupt a cult’s ritual aimed at harnessing the captivating power of cats. Meanwhile, another player controls a demonic cat and hunts them down.

title: Prism Warriors DX
summary: The Prism Warriors return for another helping of retro-styled bullet hell action. Face off against the sinister Twilight Four, and fight to save more than just your friends...

title: Oddli: A Satisfying Game
summary: ODDLI is a casual puzzle game about creating satisfying loops. Solve moving puzzles where the only obstacle is your past self. Reach the goal with your character, avoid your previous movements and watch it repeat your path. Continue reaching goals, while creating mesmerizing choreographies!

title: Cleaner Company
summary: You have officially joined the elite team of "Star Wipers"! Your mission? Cleaning! Alongside your trusted crew, you will embark on exciting expeditions to abandoned space stations, ruined restaurants in the cosmos, and unexplored planets.

title: Deep Pixel Melancholy
summary: Deep Pixel Melancholy is a visual novel about being stuck in a time loop inside a gray, soulless city. Unravel the mystery, and decide whether escaping is really worth it.

title: Grim Trials
summary: Prove your worth. Hack and blast your way through the Grim Trials. Explore the (after)life of the Academy – a training ground for aspiring Grim Reapers. Befriend fellow Reapers, learn from your mentors, and uncover the secrets of your life and love before your death.

title: Islantiles
summary: Islantiles is a cozy, minimalistic city-builder where you raise your civilization from adorable settlers to ridiculously effective explorers. Unlock groundbreaking technologies as you venture across a chain of unknown islands and discover over-the-top synergies.

title: A Heavy Morning
summary: You know the feeling of struggling to get out of bed? In A Heavy Morning, you will play as a young girl battling with her own mind. Your only objective? Get out of bed and get to work on time.

title: Innocence Rewrite
summary: "Innocence Rewrite" captures the summer before and after the college entrance exam.As old bonds mend and distant feelings return, it's a season of healing amid chaos.No need for correction fluid — just feel, and slowly rewrite the innocence of youth.

title: Arca
summary: News of the Great Flood has reached the South Pole, and rumor has it there's an Ark ready to help... but only one spot per species! Jump, slide, and sabotage your rivals as you race against time to secure your place. It's every penguin for itself and the world against them all!

title: Spacerocks
summary: Mine asteroids, find rare loot, upgrade & modify your ship, build space factories, and destroy your enemies in this next-level space shooter. Just... One... More... Asteroid...

title: Broth Bounty
summary: Broth Bounty is a fast-paced 2D shooter inspired by classic lightgun games. Blast ingredients into a bubbling pot, dodge hazards, and adapt to roguelite challenges as you cook your way to culinary victory!

title: Servant of the Lake
summary: Servant of the Lake is the new premium point-and-click adventure in the Rusty Lake series from the creators of the Cube Escape series, The Past Within and Underground Blossom.

title: Angler's Journey
summary: Idle Clicker fishing game where you attack with different weapons to catch fishes, sell them to upgrade your equipment, unlock new skills. Explore diverse fishing spots, challenge mighty boss fishes, and strive to complete your massive fish collection.

title: Soulforge: Lost Path
summary: In Soulforge: Lost Path (Survivors-like), become a legendary hunter slaughtering endless Corrupted Souls. Scavenge Sacred Remains to forge Exorcist Artefacts, manage limited inventory strategically, and uncover the world's festering corruption truth.

title: Death Kitchen

You can morph into a variety of characters! Embrace the chaos and deliver quality with your new intergalactic restaurant chain.

title: Bounce 2
summary: Bounce 2, the 1v1 Physics Based Digital Sport built with the warmth and comfort of 2D analog graphics, and the cold precision of modern computing and networking. Challenge your friends, together or online, in the Bounce Arena.

title: Road Truckers: New Beginning
summary:
Live a trucker’s life in the first trucking sim RPG. Explore villages, cities and wilderness in a fully customizable truck. Get on-foot to eat, sleep, and help people along the way. Your goal: to bring back prosperity in your region. Drive, grow, and inspire!

Experience trucking on a new level: by driving and interacting with the world around you. Make your truck unique by customizing it mechanically and visually, inside and outside. Meet people and decide how to approach them. Enjoy the beautiful scenery in different weather conditions. But most of all, see the change you’re making by supporting the economy.

title: The Shores of Stellaluna
summary: Sail a fractured world. Battle through dangerous dungeons, Stack powerful abilities, Rebuild cities, Manage trade, Survive ever-changing islands to gather lumen, get more powerful and shape the fate of a broken world in this first person craft and build focused RPG with a strong storyline.

title: Woodrot

title: Shutter Story
summary: Your friend is convinced his house is haunted. Examine his family's photo album to reveal signs of the paranormal, as the horror unfolds in the house around you. Their fate is in your hands.

title: House Flipper Remastered Collection
summary: House Flipper Remastered Collection lets you become a one-person renovation crew. Clean, build, decorate, and sell for profit! Now with better graphics, voice acting, all expansions in one toolbox, and some more heartfelt addition. It’s flipping time!

title: Papa Needs a Headshot
summary: Papa Needs a Headshot is a brutal western-steampunk FPS soaked in kin blood. Rip through flesh and bend the battlefield with your cursed metal arm. Use every bullet wisely to slaughter freaks and abominations on your warpath. Keep enduring only to put a bullet in the skull of the man who made you.

title: Talewarden: Riders of the New Day
summary: Talewarden is a weird west adventure visual novel. Restore time on a planet where the sun never sets as you explore locations, talk, romance, and bond with your companions. Find the source of the voice in your head and discover why you all fell here from different worlds.

title: Covenant 21
summary: Defeat the Covenant, round after round, using the mechanics of Black Jack and help yourself with powerful power-ups.

title: Cubex
summary: Cubex is a horror escape room game in first person, collaborative (or not) for up to 4 players, where your objective will be to find the exit of a giant cube.

title: Freestyle Football 2
summary: Freestyle Football 2 is a fast-paced, 5v5 match-based online multiplayer soccer game. Each position has a unique role, and you'll utilize a variety of strategies and skills to achieve victory with your team. Stylish play and unique characters transform the pitch into a stage.

title: Find My Frogs: Branches

title: Combat Train TD
summary: This is a tower-defense roguelike strategy game centered around combat trains. Select a suitable base, carefully plan orbital routes, upgrade your combat trains, create an unique build, and then defeat the endless waves of monsters.

title: Hollow Stories: Lockdown
summary: A neo-retro survival horror noir game where you explore, solve puzzles, and fight to survive in a city ruled by corruption and cults.

Explore a vast land, raise your knights, and conquer new territories. A free mercenary, a loyal noble, or the ruler of an empire. Choose your path.

title: Dino Citadel
summary: Command a castle-on-a-dino through a corrupted world. Rescue fallen allies, lead them in battle, and build your deck. Manage your economy to draw cards and confront the Voidrift in this tactical roguelike deckbuilder.

title: Operation Highjump: The Fall of Berlin
summary: In the last days of World War II, lead a suicide mission to hunt down the enemy leaders, steal their experimental technology and recover the art pieces and relics. A combination of frenetic action, tactical missions and an explosive run & gun platforming adventure.

title: Destiny Is Dice
summary: The knight ‘Ail’ awoke in a dungeon where everything is decided by dice. Right beside ‘Grin’, witch who can manipulate every die. With this witch's help, ‘Ail’ heads toward the dungeon. To rescue someone trapped within it. Roll, manipulate, and change fate in turn-based roguelike. ‘Destiny Is Dice’.

title: Mazebound: Hunt, Gather, Run!
summary: In this survival horror, you're surrounded by sea and a towering gate ahead. Walk into the maze, hunt, gather, and run to survive, alone or with friends. Remember: You're not the only one starving...

title: Breath of the Pasture
summary: A heartfelt life-sim about love, land, and the magic of the countryside. Compose your very own pastoral symphony— Listen to the rain as it falls. Chase the breeze on sunny days. Watch crops reach for the sky. Let your cows and sheep rest in peace. Fall in love. Grow a farm. That is THE GAME!

title: Golden Swirl
summary: GOLDEN SWIRL is a Roguelike Deck Builder blending fast-paced action with strategic card play in a dark fantasy world. Journey through shifting dungeons, uncover swirl secrets, and adapt to challenges with unique cards, relics, and a depravity system.

title: Forsaken Lands
summary: Brave heroes unite to challenge the gods themselves and decide the fate of the world! Dive into an epic roguelite deckbuilder adventure. Gather your friends and take on divine foes together in thrilling online co-op battles!

title: The Last Keeper
summary: Take on the role of a lighthouse keeper on a remote island. Maintain the machinery, use the radio and the map to guide ships into the harbor. Survive and uncover the mysteries of Farpoint Island in a horror experience inspired by Voices of the Void and No One Lives Under the Lighthouse.

title: Blast Head
summary: Blast Head is a fast-paced action roguelite/bullet heaven with absurd weapons, powerful runes, and non-linear weapon skill trees. Dive into 10–30 minute runs, discover wild synergies, and unleash chaos across alien arenas.

title: Catio Simulator
summary: Catio Simulator is a relaxing idle game in which you decorate a catio to attract cats. Pet your cats to get them ready for adoption, collect adoption fees, and buy new decorations and petting abilities!

title: Cheat Death
summary: Cheat Death is a horror rogue-lite game where you gamble with the Grim Reaper. The dice are loaded, the deck is stacked against you, and the only way to win is to CHEAT. Use cards, dice, and every trick in the book to survive this high-stakes encounter.

title: Nophenia
summary: explore atmospheric dreams of vagrant but familiar memories.

title: Gloom Punks
summary: Not your average co-op roguelike. Where the price for power is death, and you’re trapped in a gloom-scape of fever dreams and fairytales gone feral, you can only rely on Punks like yourself. Cheat death, bounce back, and take on a world that so badly wants you dead!

title: The Gate Must Stand
summary: Fend off brutal waves of demonic hordes as a mobile hero amongst your stationary allies. As the city’s last line of defense, recruit followers, unlock upgrades, and synergize skills to hold the line against apocalyptic bosses. Remember: heroes can fall, but the gate must stand.

title: Nocturnal Visitors: Book One
summary: Discover a world where magic and science, chaos and order, are two sides of the same coin.

title: Ruin: Beast City
summary: Assassinate your targets with style, as you uncover a plot of world domination and ancient horrors in this boss fight action game. Dive deep into the dark ruins of the Beast City, where only lunatic killers remain.

title: Scopecreep
summary: A whispering flame craves souls. With each offering, your resolve strengthens. Fight spirits, collect their essences, and feed a hunger that may never subside in this short active incremental.

title: Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages
summary: Unravel the Power of the Cosmos in Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages. Follow Athla’s Wizard Kings through the Astral Sea, discover their secret arts, and face the perils they left behind. Features story realms, tomes, and wildlife.

title: Cat Isle
summary:
Cat Isle is a cozy pixel art management game inspired by Japan’s famous Cat Islands. It blends light management elements with a strong focus on atmosphere and player expression. While managing different types of shop supplies and understanding cat preferences is part of the experience, the game centers more on relaxing gameplay, fishing, interacting with cats, decorating buildings, and simply observing the world you create.
Players can unlock decorations through a Gashapon machine and customize shops and surroundings to shape the island’s look and feel. As you build and decorate, the island slowly transforms into a cozy space full of cute cats.

title: Mirklurk: Every Step Matters
summary: You have been exiled to The Mirk - an unforgiving swampland where every step can be your last. You must constantly make choices: what paths to take, which tree to shelter under, what beasts to engage or avoid, what items to bring into the darkness of dungeons, and what to leave behind.

title: Slime Tales
summary: Embark on a pixel-art roguelite adventure as a brave little slime exploring a mysterious dungeon beneath a sorcerer’s castle. Battle deadly foes, uncover ancient secrets, and power up with loot and upgrades—solo or with friends!
